ddls:
CREATE TABLE "intersections" (
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intersection */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the intersection */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the intersection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the intersection */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the intersection */,
  "neighborhood" TEXT /* Neighborhood or area where the intersection is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic signal */,
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intersection the signal is located at */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of traffic signal (e.g., 2-phase, 3-phase) */,
  "cycle_time" INTEGER /* Cycle time of the traffic signal in seconds */,
  "yellow_time" INTEGER /* Yellow time of the traffic signal in seconds */,
  "red_time" INTEGER /* Red time of the traffic signal in seconds */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration of the traffic signal */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the traffic signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_signals_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_volumes" (
  "volume_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic volume record */,
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intersection the data is for */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period the data was collected (e.g., AM peak, PM peak) */,
  "time_period_start" TEXT /* Start time of the time period */,
  "time_period_end" TEXT /* End time of the time period */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week the data was collected */,
  "total_flow" INTEGER /* Total traffic flow in vehicles per hour */,
  "flow_1" INTEGER /* Traffic flow on approach 1 in vehicles per hour */,
  "flow_2" INTEGER /* Traffic flow on approach 2 in vehicles per hour */,
  "flow_3" INTEGER /* Traffic flow on approach 3 in vehicles per hour */,
  "flow_4" INTEGER /* Traffic flow on approach 4 in vehicles per hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volume_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_volumes_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_timing_plans" (
  "plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal timing plan */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the traffic signal the plan is for */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name of the signal timing plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the signal timing plan */,
  "cycle_time" INTEGER /* Cycle time of the signal timing plan in seconds */,
  "green_time_1" INTEGER /* Green time for approach 1 in seconds */,
  "green_time_2" INTEGER /* Green time for approach 2 in seconds */,
  "green_time_3" INTEGER /* Green time for approach 3 in seconds */,
  "green_time_4" INTEGER /* Green time for approach 4 in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_timing_plans_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES traffic_signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intersection the data is for */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metrics were calculated */,
  "metric_time" TEXT /* Time when the performance metrics were calculated */,
  "delay" REAL /* Average delay in seconds */,
  "stops_per_vehicle" REAL /* Average stops per vehicle */,
  "stop_delay" REAL /* Average stop delay in seconds */,
  "emissions_co" REAL /* Average emissions in CO */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Average fuel consumption in gallons */,
  "stddev_delay" REAL /* Standard deviation of delay in seconds */,
  "avg_queue_length" REAL /* Average queue length in vehicles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic data record */,
  "intersection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the intersection the data is for */,
  "time_stamp" TEXT /* Time stamp of the data */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Traffic volume in vehicles per hour */,
  "speed" REAL /* Traffic speed in miles per hour */,
  "occupancy" REAL /* Traffic occupancy as a percentage */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the traffic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_data_intersection_id FOREIGN KEY ("intersection_id") REFERENCES intersections ("intersection_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., traffic engineer, administrator) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the system setting */,
  "setting_category" TEXT /* Category of the system setting (e.g., general, traffic signals, user management) */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the system setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log record */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the log record */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log message (e.g., debug, info, warning, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
